title: Follow the Boys
writer: Lou Breslow, Gertrude Purcell, Joe Schoenfeld
actors: George Raft, Vera Zorina, Grace McDonald
plot: During World War II, all the studios put out "all-star" vehicles which featured virtually every star on the lot--often playing themselves--in musical numbers and comedy skits, and were meant as morale-boosters to both the troops o...
